title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 9.402 - Amyloidosis Awareness Day, May 8
text:
9.402.  Amyloidosis Awareness Day, May 8. — May eighth each year is hereby designated as "Amyloidosis Awareness Day" in Missouri.  The citizens of this state are encouraged to participate in appropriate events and activities to raise awareness of this rare and life-threatening disease.
(L. 2025 S.B. 348)
